{{Infobox character
| name = Fingerling
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|spray destructive pink light}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|, Fingerling technique}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Bloodline (novel)|Bloodline]]
}}

''See also: [[Fingerling Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Fingerling is a pink, serpentine [[dragon]] that serves as the bound spirit and manifestation of [[Jai Chen]]'s power. Originally the size of a finger, the creature earned its nickname due to its diminutive starting size and a preference for consuming small fish. As an extension of [[Jai Chen]], the [[dragon]] possesses unique pink [[madra]] that behaves differently than standard fire; instead of flames, it can manifest as a dense cloud that dissolves targets or as destructive pink light. In combat, Fingerling is capable of attacking techniques and can even engage in wrestling matches. Despite being a powerful entity, the [[dragon]] is prone to exhaustion during battle and has been known to act as an alert for its companion, using keening sounds to signal danger.}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Fingerling is a pink, serpentine [[dragon]] spirit that remains bonded to [[Jai Chen]]. During their journey, the creature breathes a unique form of pink [[madra]]. Although Fingerling eventually grows tired and begins drifting lower in the air, the spirit continues to fly around [[Jai Chen]] while remaining alert.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Fingerling]] is a pink, serpentine [[dragon]] spirit bonded to [[Jai Chen]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10">''Bloodline'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Fingerling]] is a pink [[dragon]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Fingerling]] is a bonded spirit held by [[Jai Chen]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Fingerling]] breathes a strange pink [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Fingerling]] is growing tired and drifting lower in the air.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Fingerling]] flew around [[Jai Chen]] while remaining alert.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]] battles [[Jai Chen]]’s spirit, [[Fingerling]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Fingerling]] was being poked with a [[drudge]] shaped like a spiky ball.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11">''Reaper'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Fingerling]] can spray destructive pink light.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Jai Chen]] unleashes the [[Fingerling]] technique.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Fingerling]] makes a high-pitched keening noise.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Fingerling]] croons on [[Jai Chen]]'s shoulder.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Jai Chen steadied her feet and stretched out both hands. “Fingerling!”<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
